positive: A stylized, high-contrast composition of a mythical cosmic landscape viewed through giant, stylized ferns and mushroom caps. The scene features glowing constellations and soft nebula clouds interwoven with ancient, geometric forest elements. The composition must be highly symmetrical, centralized, and optimized for a single, repeating apparel print. Use a color palette dominated by deep midnight blues, vibrant teal, emerald greens, and neon gold accents. The style should be a blend of detailed woodcut linework and mid-century celestial art, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes, crisp edges, and deep shadow contrast. Studio quality illustration, vector graphic, isolated on a neutral background.
negative: blurry, noisy, sketch, photo, realistic, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, logo, low detail, artifacts, chromatic aberration, sepia, gradients
